description: This file defines application configuration settings loaded from environment variables, including server, CORS, authentication, and database settings, encapsulated in a dataclass named Settings, with a function get_settings() to load and return these settings.

classes.name: Settings
classes.description: Immutable dataclass encapsulating application configuration settings loaded from environment variables.

methods.name: List[str] _split_csv(value: Optional[str])
methods.description: Helper function to split comma-separated string environment variable values into a list of strings, stripping whitespace.

methods.name: Settings get_settings()
methods.description: Main function to load application settings from environment variables, providing default values if necessary.
